one_liner: OpenAI-compatible engine endpoint + deterministic tasks. Schema-valid JSON and tool calls — or fail closed.

flagship.promise: JSON schemas and tool calls must validate; auto-repair or fail closed before response leaves the API

tasks.promise: Bounded deterministic outcomes with max fanout 0; fail closed on policy breach
tasks.auth: Bearer sk-nf-… (same API key as chat)

drop_in.sdk_note: Keep OpenAI SDK for chat. Use POST /v1/tasks for deterministic webpage repair.

standard.note: Cheap flash matrix. Default for general chat.

coding_pro.enable: Workspace → Enable Coding Pro, then set model=noetfield-coding-pro
coding_pro.stack: Deterministic planner + parallel cheap workers → DeepSeek chat → GLM → Kimi code → HF coder
coding_pro.note: Same base_url + key. Higher per-token rate for coding quality.

buyers: SaaS CTO / VP Engineering with >$5k/mo LLM spend

_acquisition_internal.loop: intent ads → landing → API key → credits → refer (+$10) → top-up

do_not: Invent a parallel OpenAI-proxy SKU with different promises
